# Math Heavy Test

## Inline Math

The equation $E = mc^2$ is famous. Also $\alpha + \beta = \gamma$.

The quadratic formula: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$

## Block Math

$$
\nabla \times \mathbf{E} = -\frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t}
$$

$$
\mathcal{L} = \int_{t_1}^{t_2} L(q, \dot{q}, t) \, dt
$$

$$
\begin{pmatrix}
a & b \\
c & d
\end{pmatrix}
\begin{pmatrix}
x \\
y
\end{pmatrix}
=
\begin{pmatrix}
ax + by \\
cx + dy
\end{pmatrix}
$$

## Mixed Content

Here is a paragraph with inline math $\sum_{i=0}^n x_i$ and then a block:

$$
\int_0^1 x^n \, dx = \frac{1}{n+1}
$$

More text with $\theta$ and $\phi$ variables.
